race.comment: SACRIFY (10) improving gelding who looks well in at the weights with Fitzgerald's 3kg claim. Sat on the good tempo and kept finding first-up with a sound third over 1500m here. Looks set for a good prep and will give plenty of cheek at the big odds. TAZIMA (3) lightly raced stayer heading in the right direction. Was just under a month between runs when he rounded them up with ease to salute as fav over 1900m at Rosehill seven week. Kept up to the mark with a 1207m trial and expected to go close. CENTENARIO (5) resumes with residual fitness on his side. Found plenty with the 58kg for a game on-pace second over 2400m at Rosehill in BM78 class on February 25. Two recent trials were good and sure to be thereabouts. NATOYA (11) gave a good account of herself when she jumped in grade with a closing second over 1600m at Warwick Farm. Can make the necessary improvement as she gets out to her right trip.
